title: P-168R The Entitlement of Municipalities to Claim Input Tax Credits in Respect of the GST/HST Incurred for Infrastructure Development Relating to Sales of Serviced Lots - Canada.ca
content:
## P-168R The Entitlement of Municipalities to Claim Input Tax Credits in Respect of the GST/HST Incurred for Infrastructure Development Relating to Sales of Serviced Lots

## Notice to the reader
The GST/HST rates referenced in this publication are those that were in effect at the time of publishing. For the list of all applicable GST/HST rates (current and historic), go to GST/HST calculator (and rates) .
